semantic_meaning: Records the timestamp of the last outbound communication logged against a contact, including calls, emails, meetings, chat conversations, LinkedIn messages, postal mail, SMS, and WhatsApp messages. This is the go-to field for measuring engagement recency and identifying cold contacts.
auto_population_source: Updated automatically when calls, emails, meetings, chat conversations, LinkedIn messages, postal mail, SMS, or WhatsApp messages are logged through HubSpot.
common_uses: Re-engagement workflows: trigger outreach when no contact in 30/60/90 days
Sales manager dashboards: identify reps who haven't contacted assigned leads recently
List segmentation: build 'cold contacts' lists for re-engagement campaigns
SLA monitoring: ensure every MQL is contacted within a target timeframe

alternatives_to_consider.when_appropriate: When you want to track the last time the contact engaged with sales content (forms, documents, meetings links, tracked emails) — this is engagement-initiated, not outbound-initiated
When you specifically need the date of the last meeting booked via the meetings tool, not all communication types
When you specifically want to know the last time a contact replied to a sales email, not just when they were contacted
